overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character crosses an intersection at Drake Ave, walks along commercial sidewalks with holographic billboards, explores a narrow residential alley, and continues through the bustling downtown area with towering skyscrapers and elevated transit structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with marked crosswalk

events.description: black luxury sedan drives through intersection from right to left
character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: character in purple shirt and black shorts waiting at corner then walking across the red and yellow striped crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to ego's path
pedestrian in light clothing crossing the street in opposite direction

entered.detail: blue street sign mounted on black pole at intersection corner
futuristic enclosed walkway spanning between commercial buildings
tall building with reflective glass facade and large advertisements
distinctive red and yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit futuristic intersection marked by a 'Drake Ave' street sign. The character crosses a distinctive red and yellow striped crosswalk while a black sedan passes through the intersection. Elevated pedestrian bridges and glass office towers frame the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with elevated transit and digital billboards

events.description: character steps off crosswalk onto sidewalk, entering semi-covered walkway area
character turns slightly left following the curve of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing by storefronts and large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive blue hair walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large digital advertisement displaying 'nicola' brand with white background
futuristic monorail track structure running overhead between buildings
temporary red and white striped barriers blocking part of the sidewalk
row of shops with illuminated signs and glass display windows

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open intersection to a commercial sidewalk lined with digital billboards including a prominent 'nicola' advertisement. An elevated transit rail runs overhead while red and white construction barriers line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential alley between high-rise buildings

events.description: character turns right into narrow alleyway between residential buildings
camera tilts upward to look at the building facades and sky above

agents.ego_description: exploring a narrow back alley, looking up at the dense residential architecture and hanging laundry

entered.detail: weathered concrete residential building with multiple balconies and external wiring
multiple AC units and ventilation equipment mounted on building exterior
fabric and sheets hanging from windows on makeshift lines
green waste bins and scattered debris in the alleyway
stairs leading down to a lower level on the right side of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow residential alleyway, leaving the busy commercial street behind. The space is enclosed by tall apartment buildings with external air conditioners and hanging laundry. The camera tilts up to reveal the dense vertical architecture before the character exits back to the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with neon advertisements and outdoor cafes

events.description: character exits narrow alley back onto main commercial street with neon signs
passing under colorful neon billboards creates shifting colored light on surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing other pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in business suit walking toward the camera
person with backpack and distinctive clothing walking in same direction

entered.detail: large purple digital advertisement displaying 'Set Sail' text with human figure
spinning neon bullseye target sign mounted on building facade
massive concrete overpass structure with vehicles traveling above
outdoor seating areas with umbrellas and tables

segments.scene_description: Exiting the alley, the character returns to a vibrant commercial street illuminated by neon signs including a prominent 'Set Sail' billboard and a spinning target sign. The sidewalk is bustling with pedestrians and lined with outdoor cafes, while an elevated highway structure runs overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with tall corporate skyscrapers

events.description: character slows down while approaching the crosswalk area
strong sunlight creates lens flare effect between the tall buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching a major intersection with increasing pedestrian traffic and tall buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered at the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: very tall modern tower with distinctive circular window patterns and glass facade
red traffic light suspended over the street ahead
white zebra crossing markings on the road surface ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a major intersection dominated by a towering glass skyscraper with circular window patterns. The environment opens up to full sky exposure with strong sunlight creating lens flares. Pedestrians gather at the crosswalk ahead as traffic signals control the flow of sparse vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city, transitioning from a bright open intersection into a claustrophobic residential alley before emerging into a sprawling neon-lit commercial district. It begins at a sunlit intersection marked by a Drake Ave sign, where the character crosses a red and yellow striped crosswalk beneath glass office towers. As the camera moves forward, the open road shifts into a commercial sidewalk lined with digital billboards and construction barriers under an elevated transit rail. The scene then narrows as the character turns into a dense residential alleyway enclosed by apartment buildings and hanging laundry, before turning back toward the main street. Finally, the environment expands into a vibrant district of neon signs and outdoor cafes, culminating in a wide view of a towering glass skyscraper under a bright sky with strong lens flares.
